text: Congratulations on your new little one! Becoming a parent is one of the most profound and life-changing experiences there is, and I am so thrilled for you. Those first moments, days, and weeks are going to be a whirlwind of wonder, exhaustion, and more love than you ever thought possible. Cherish every bit of it, even the bleary-eyed 3 a.m. moments, because somehow it all goes by faster than you can imagine. You are going to be wonderful at this. Wishing you, your partner, and your beautiful new baby all the joy in the world.
